l2.patch_summary: /private/var/folders/qz/tvk0zr9d50x0l58mns1thvph0000gn/T/pytest-of-hyeonexcel/pytest-32/test_integrated_pipeline_expos0/integrated.py:3 기준 코드 스니펫 patch preview를 생성했습니다.
l2.patch_diff:

+cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s', (user_input,))
